name: Nanlite Transmitter Box WS TB1
description: Designed to wirelessly control multiple lights in the Nanlite line, the nanlink transmitter box is a 2400 MHz battery

features.Key Features :: 512 DMX Channels / 2.4 GHz and Bluetooth | Built-In Rechargeable Battery | DC Input Power: 7.2 to 15 VDC | Compatible with Multiple Nanlite Lights
features.What’s In The Box :: Nanlite NANLINK Transmitter Box | USB-A to USB-C Cable | Padded Travel Case | Limited 2-Year Warranty, 1-Year Extension with Registration | Limited 2-Year Manufacturer Warrant
